_comment: Corpse Yin Sect (尸阴宗) — operates in/around the Sea of Devils (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L45). Sun Tai (N37) is from here; later served Wang Lin. Canon: cultivates corpse puppets, yin-aspect techniques. Stand-in: snowy village (cold, eerie). Final: corpse-vault halls, yin-qi gathering arrays, sealed corpse-puppet chambers.
